# Screenshot Captions — Publisher Portal

Ready-to-paste captions for **HydroComplete for Civil 3D v1.3.0** (10 shots).
Capture steps: `SCREENSHOTS.md`. Save PNGs to `dist/app-store/screenshots/`.

---

## 1 — Ribbon tab

**HydroComplete Analysis commands on a dedicated ribbon tab — one-click access to capacity, HGL, reports, and stormwater tools without memorizing HC_* names.**

---

## 2 — Manning capacity

**Manning full-barrel capacity and velocity for every pipe in the network — computed directly from Civil 3D pipe geometry (circular, box, and arch).**

---

## 3 — Design capacity overload

**Design flow vs full-barrel capacity at every pipe — surcharge flags, d/D ratio, and overloaded-pipe summary for quick sizing review.**

---

## 4 — Hydraulic grade line

**Steady hydraulic grade line at design Q using Manning normal depth — optional HEC-22 losses with plan labels on HC-HGL and profile polyline on HC-HGL-PROFILE.**

---

## 5 — Full-network analysis

**HC_ANALYZE runs hydrology, routing, HGL, sediment, and compliance in one pass — a single command summary for the whole pipe network.**

---

## 6 — Detention routing

**Detention pond routing with Modified Puls — SCS unit-hydro inflow and orifice/weir outlet stages shown step by step.**

---

## 7 — Pre/post peak control

**Pre- and post-development peak comparison with SCS unit hydrographs — multi-storm state depth table for regulatory submittals.**

---

## 8 — Formula-transparent report

**Formula-transparent HTML report — every Manning and HGL number traceable to its equation, inputs, and units.**

---

## 9 — Atlas 14 IDF

**Live NOAA Atlas 14 PFDS intensity from drawing geolocation — 25 embedded US city presets when offline.**

---

## 10 — Pro activation

**Activate Pro with email and beta token — online validation or offline stub unlocks sealable PDF export (HC_REPORT_PDF).**
